description: HTML source code for the Database Viewer web interface, providing UI layout, styling, and client-side logic for browsing databases, tables, and viewing data within a web app.

methods.name: loadDatabases
methods.description: Fetches and displays list of available databases from server API.

methods.name: refreshDatabases
methods.description: Refreshes the list of databases, resetting state.

methods.name: toggleDatabase
methods.description: Expands or collapses database to show/hide tables.

methods.name: loadTables
methods.description: Fetches list of tables for a selected database.

methods.name: loadTableData
methods.description: Loads and displays data for a selected table.

methods.name: renderTable
methods.description: Renders the data table with rows and columns.

methods.name: renderCell
methods.description: Generates HTML for individual cell, handling large text, objects, and nulls.

methods.name: expandCell
methods.description: Expands or collapses cell content for large text or objects.
